title: Saturn’s Failure Echoes Upward
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Marines, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Luffy, Vegapunk as Egghead’s aftermath reshapes the world: Vegapunk’s truth spreads, Saturn faces consequences, and the route toward Elbaf opens.
scene: Egghead’s aftermath reshapes the world: Vegapunk’s truth spreads, Saturn faces consequences, and the route toward Elbaf opens.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Thank you for the Ofortu- Nity!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It would have been a shame to junk such an exciting specimen!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And yet... it clearly moved to protect straw hat Luffy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Saint Saturn, as a humble and loyal soldier of the Government...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I have one question weighing on my mind...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You said allowing vegapunk's message to get out was a 'failure'...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Does that imply there was some truth behind his remarks???

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We need a medic! Slap one of them awake!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Why's the Cloud Factory Going HAYWERE?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It must be Edison, that VAMN fool!! He couldn't just roll over and we in the fabric-stratum, could he?!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Aftermath through 25 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
